name: Pan Roasted Lamb Chops with Cracked Pepper & Taragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the black pepper on a plate and press each lamb chop firmly into the pepper so that it adheres to the meat.
2. Heat olive oil in two large skillets over high heat.
3. Add the peppercrusted chops and sear quickly on both sides.
4. Sprinkle the chops with salt.
5. Reduce the heat to medium. Do not degrease the pan.
6. Add beef broth and lime juice, and continue cooking until the chops reach the desired doneness (about 2 minutes for medium rare).
7. Remove the chops to a plate and keep warm in an oven set to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. If using dried tarragon, add it now to the skillets and continue cooking until the liquid reduces to a shiny glaze.
9. Turn off the heat. Whisk in butter.
10. Add grated lime peel and chopped fresh tarragon (if using).
11. Remove the chops from the oven to a warm platter. Drizzle any lamb juices over the sauce.
12. Serve the sauce with the chops.
